typography.instructions: Import 'Rajdhani' (weights 500, 600, 700) and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts. Use Rajdhani for all headings to give a square, tech-focused look. Use JetBrains Mono for any code snippets, data values, or 'technical' labels.

usage.background: Use #050505 as the main page background. Avoid pure black #000000.
usage.primary: Use Neon Blue (#00F0FF) for primary actions, active states, and key highlights.
usage.secondary: Use Neon Orange (#FF5F00) for secondary actions or to create contrast against the blue.
usage.text: Headings in pure White (#FFFFFF). Body text in Muted Foreground (#A1A1AA) to reduce eye strain.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,95,0,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm
buttons.outline: border border-primary/50 text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 hover:border-primary transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm

cards.base: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg

inputs.base: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 rounded-sm transition-all duration-200

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-white/5
navigation.link: text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary transition-colors uppercase tracking-wide

textures.noise: opacity-20 mix-blend-overlay pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-[9999] bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

universal_guidelines.design_philosophy: Cyberpunk Utility. Functional but visually striking. High contrast, neon accents, dark backgrounds.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA contrast ratios. Use aria-labels for icon-only buttons.
universal_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-button').
universal_guidelines.responsive: Mobile-first. Ensure touch targets are at least 44px on mobile.
universal_guidelines.motion: Use smooth, tech-like transitions (ease-out). Avoid bouncy or playful animations. Think 'machine precision'.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Implement the 'Rajdhani' font immediately in index.css. 2. Update tailwind.config.js with the neon color palette. 3. Create a 'Layout' component that includes the background grid texture and header. 4. Use the provided image URLs for the category cards. 5. Ensure all Shadcn components are customized to match the dark/neon aesthetic (remove rounded-xl, use rounded-sm or rounded-md, add border glows).
